$comment: Machine-readable source of truth for INTENTIONALLY unmapped Pine components. A top-level pds-* component passes the Figma Code Connect coverage guard (libs/core/scripts/check-figma-coverage.mjs) when it has a matching libs/figma/components/<name>.figma.ts OR an entry here. Remove a component's entry once it is mapped. Keep CODE_CONNECT_COVERAGE.md in sync (a future change can render that doc from this file).

waived.pds-accordion: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-accordion.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-box: Layout primitive; may map to layout frames rather than a single component node.
waived.pds-combobox: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-combobox.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-container: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-container.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-copytext: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-copytext.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-dropdown-menu: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-dropdown-menu.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-icon: Icon set lives in @pine-ds/icons; map if Figma documents a dedicated icon wrapper.
waived.pds-image: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-image.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-multiselect: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-multiselect.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-popover: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-popover.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-row: Often used with pds-box; may share layout documentation.
waived.pds-sortable: Figma substitutions exist for sortable list patterns; wire components/pds-sortable.figma.ts when aligned.
waived.pds-table: Composite; consider per-subcomponent mappings (row, cell, head) if needed.
waived.pds-text: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-text.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
waived.pds-tooltip: No Figma Code Connect mapping yet; add components/pds-tooltip.figma.ts when the Figma node is ready.
